# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-upload-artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: compiled-binaries
          path: ./dist/

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: config-files
          path: ./config/

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts
          path: ./scripts/

      - name: Make artifacts available for download
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: compiled-binaries
          path: ./dist/
